security.csp: default-src 'self'; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost http://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost http://asset.localhost; audio-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost http://asset.localhost; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com
